title: Audit connection pragmas
description: Read connection setup and report whether WAL, busy_timeout, and foreign_keys are configured for the workload.
body: Use when asked whether an SQLite setup is sound. Actions: inspect where connections are opened and report which pragmas are set — confirm journal_mode is WAL for concurrent access, busy_timeout is non-zero, foreign_keys is ON, and synchronous matches the durability need; check whether read-then-write paths use BEGIN IMMEDIATE. Do not assume defaults are safe (foreign_keys is off by default). Report and record the open routine and classify gaps as default-journal, no-busy-timeout, FKs-off, or upgrade-deadlock-prone. This skill is read-only against a copy. Validation signals include a startup pragma check confirming the settings. Risk boundary: foreign_keys left off on a relational schema is a data-integrity finding to flag.
